title: Perfusion Mission and Vision
content:
Perfusion Mission and Vision

Vision

The vision of the perfusion department is to become a recognized and preferred pioneering department at national and international level with a student-oriented and practice-oriented education program to be given during the undergraduate program.

Mission

The mission of the Department ofPerfusion is to educate healthcare professionals that administer extracorporealcirculation by using cardiopulmonary pump in cooperation with surgeons andanaesthetists in the organ transplantation and interventions on the heart andcardiac veins.
